marketResultPubkey.description: On-chain MarketResult account pubkey (present when market is settled and claimable).

isTeamMarket.description: Whether this is a team market

resolveAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when market was resolved

clobTokenIds.description: CLOB token IDs for each outcome

marketOptions.description: Structured options for FE display (e.g. [{ label: "O 228.5", buyYes: true }])

sportsLine.description: Sports betting line value (e.g. "228.5" for totals, "-1.5" for spreads)

marketResultPubkey.description: On-chain MarketResult account pubkey (present when market is settled and claimable).

isTeamMarket.description: Whether this is a team market

resolveAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when market was resolved

marketOptions.description: Structured options for FE display (e.g. [{ label: "Odd", buyYes: true }])

isLive.description: Whether the GX market is live

sportsLine.description: GX sports betting line value from Saba Point (e.g. "-1.5" for spreads)

providerSportsLine.description: Raw GX/Saba sports betting line value before user-facing conversion (e.g. "-0.5" for live spreads)

lineBasis.description: Whether sportsLine is the raw provider line only or a provider line displayed with a score snapshot.

lifecycleStatus.description: Forecast trading lifecycle: open, resolving after close time, or settled after issuer resolution.

tradable.description: Whether this Forecast side can be traded right now

marketResultPubkey.description: Always null for Forecast markets: settlement is on the Issuer side and never touches our program.

isTeamMarket.description: Whether this is a team market

resolveAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when market was resolved

marketOptions.description: Structured options for FE display. One-sided team market: [{ label: "Up", buyYes: true }]

outcomeSide.description: Human side for this per-side Forecast market

sideLabel.description: Display label for this per-side Forecast market

outcomeMint.description: This side's tradable Token-2022 outcome mint (self-custody)

marketPda.description: On-chain Issuer Market account pubkey (shared by both sides)

outcomeTokenProgram.description: Token program id owning the outcome mint (Token-2022)

isActive.description: Whether the event is active (listed on events)

isLive.description: Whether the event is currently live

category.description: The category for the event, allowed values: all, crypto, sports, politics, esports, culture, economics, tech

beginAt.description: Unix timestamp (seconds) when the event begins

score.description: Raw score string from the provider (e.g. "3-2"); FE splits as needed

elapsed.description: Saba sessionTime mapped into the existing elapsed field

finishedTimestamp.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the game finished, if ended

updatedAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of the last event update

liveScore.description: Latest Saba/GX live score from the event feed when Saba provided LiveHomeScore and LiveAwayScore

rulesPdf.description: Document to full rules for the event

eventCount.description: Number of matching events in this subcategory

filterSubcategories.description: Concrete subcategory values to send to the events subcategories filter

subcategory.description: Concrete provider subcategory represented by the parent group

eventCount.description: Number of matching events in this child subcategory

filterSubcategories.description: Concrete subcategory values to send to the events subcategories filter

children.description: Concrete provider subcategories nested below grouped sports types, when applicable

eventCount.description: Number of matching events in this category

subcategories.description: Distinct non-empty subcategories nested under this category

score.description: Raw score string from the provider (e.g. "3-2"); FE splits as needed

finishedTimestamp.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the game finished, if ended

updatedAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of the last score update

error.description: Error message if the transaction failed

mode.description: Cancel fee charged; the venue cancel and local close are keeper-owned

transaction.description: Always null for async venue cancels

jupiterSwapRequestId.description: Jupiter swap request id returned by POST /orders for the Forecast swap

ownerPubkey.description: Trading wallet (taker); must be a signer on the transaction

ExecutionContext.description: Optional structured hint echoed from a build endpoint's `execution.context`. Validated against the signed transaction when present (the transaction remains the source of truth). For a Forecast swap it may carry jupiterSwapRequestId + ownerPubkey instead of the top-level fields.

signedTransaction.description: Base64 encoded transaction signed by the owner

requestId.description: Optional client correlation ID, echoed back in the response

jupiterSwapRequestId.description: Forecast swap path only: the Jupiter swap request id returned by POST /orders. Required to relay a Forecast swap to Jupiter's /execute.

ownerPubkey.description: Forecast swap path only: the trading wallet (taker). Used to attribute the swap in the Forecast trade ledger; must be a signer on the transaction.

marketOptions.description: Structured options for FE display (e.g. [{ label: "O 228.5", buyYes: true }])

ownerPubkey.description: Order owner public key (alias of owner, use ownerPubkey when available)

marketId.description: External market identifier used to derive the PDA

marketIdHash.description: Hashed market identifier used for on-chain PDAs

isYes.description: True when order is for the YES side

isBuy.description: True when order is a buy order

createdAt.description: Unix timestamp (seconds) when the order was created

updatedAt.description: Unix timestamp (seconds) when the order last changed on-chain

contracts.description: Legacy whole-contract quantity string, floored for compatibility

contractsMicro.description: Requested order quantity in micro-contract units (u64 as string, 1000000 = 1); market buys may fill beyond this estimate

contractsDecimal.description: Requested order quantity as a decimal string; market buys may fill beyond this estimate

maxFillPriceUsd.description: Maximum fill price in micro USD (u64 as string)

filledAt.description: Unix timestamp (seconds) when the order was filled (0 when pending)

filledContracts.description: Legacy filled whole-contract quantity string, floored for compatibility

filledContractsMicro.description: Exact filled contract quantity in micro-contract units (u64 as string)

filledContractsDecimal.description: Exact filled contract quantity as a decimal string

avgFillPriceUsd.description: Average fill price in micro USD (u64 as string)

settled.description: Whether the order has been settled on-chain

orderId.description: External order identifier from the venue

sizeUsd.description: Order notional in micro USD (u128 as string)

endpoint.description: Endpoint that submits the returned transaction

ExecutionMetadata.description: How to submit the returned transaction. Echo `context` back to POST /execute. Omitted for quote-only responses (no transaction).

requiredSigners.description: Public keys that must sign the transaction

marketIdHash.description: Hashed market identifier used for on-chain PDAs

positionPubkey.description: Position PDA used for the order

isBuy.description: True when the order increases exposure

isYes.description: True when the order is on the YES side

outcomeSide.description: Forecast side encoded by the per-side marketId

contracts.description: Legacy whole-contract quantity string, floored for compatibility

contractsMicro.description: Estimated market-buy quantity or exact non-market quantity in micro-contract units (1000000 = 1)

contractsDecimal.description: Estimated market-buy quantity or exact non-market quantity as a decimal string

newContracts.description: Legacy position whole-contract quantity after the order, floored

newContractsMicro.description: Estimated post-order position quantity for market buys or exact post-order quantity for non-market orders in micro-contract units (1000000 = 1)

newContractsDecimal.description: Estimated post-order position quantity for market buys or exact post-order quantity for non-market orders as a decimal string

maxBuyPriceUsd.description: Max fill price for buys (micro USD)

minSellPriceUsd.description: Min fill price for sells (micro USD)

slippageBps.description: Order slippage in basis points. Polymarket buys use estimated price impact vs best ask; Polymarket sells use calculated worst fill vs best bid; Forecast swap orders return 0.

maxSlippageBps.description: Maximum slippage in basis points allowed by prediction-market slippage protection before the order is rejected. Polymarket sells return the configured event-type threshold; paths without an explicit order slippage guard return null.

orderCostUsd.description: Total spend required for this order in micro USD

newAvgPriceUsd.description: Estimated average position entry price after the order

newSizeUsd.description: Estimated total position cost basis after the order

newPayoutUsd.description: Estimated position max payout after the order

payoutUsd.description: Estimated max payout from this order's contracts alone in micro USD, ignoring any existing position

executionModel.description: How the trade executes: 'atomic_swap' for the Forecast swap path

settlement.description: Settlement model: 'auto' for Forecast auto-settle markets

jupiterSwapRequestId.description: Forecast swap path only: the Jupiter swap request id. Echo it back as jupiterSwapRequestId on POST /execute so the app can relay the signed swap to Jupiter's /execute.

userPubkey.description: Order owner public key (deprecated alias; use ownerPubkey)

payerPubkey.description: Fee payer public key (defaults to ownerPubkey when omitted)

integrator.description: Integrator public key for fee sharing

marketId.description: Hashed or canonical market ID for buys

contracts.description: Legacy whole-contract quantity. Use contractsMicro or contractsDecimal for exact fractional quantities.

contractsMicro.description: Exact contract quantity in micro-contract units (1000000 = 1)

contractsDecimal.description: Exact contract quantity as a decimal string, e.g. 5.777773

maxBuyPriceUsd.description: Micro-USD price; must be > 0, < $1, and on the market tick

minSellPriceUsd.description: Micro-USD price; must be > 0, < $1, and on the market tick

depositAmount.description: Amount must conform to the token decimals used by the token mint in `depositMint`

depositMint.description: Mint address for the deposit token

orderType.description: Order type. Limit orders are supported for Polymarket markets.

skipSigning.description: When true, returns an unsigned transaction for use with POST /execute. Defaults to false (authority-signed) for backwards compatibility.

returnQuoteOnInsufficientFunds.description: When true, an order whose owner cannot cover the deposit returns a quote-only response (transaction, txMeta, externalOrderId, orderPubkey, and orderAtaPubkey are null) instead of failing with INSUFFICIENT_FUNDS. Defaults to false.

transaction.description: Base64-encoded unsigned v0 Solana transaction containing priority-fee instructions and the limit-order cancel fee transfer

cancelExpiresAtMs.description: Unix timestamp in milliseconds when the prepared cancel-fee transaction expires

allOf.description: How to submit the signed cancel-fee transaction. Echo `context` back to POST /execute or the deprecated /orders/execute alias with `signedTransaction` set to the signed transaction.

Order owner public key (deprecated alias; use ownerPubkey)

cancelTransaction.description: Base64-encoded signed v0 Solana transaction containing the prepared priority-fee instructions, one memo, and one SOL transfer for the limit order cancel fee

cancelExpiresAtMs.description: Unix timestamp in milliseconds included in the cancel memo; must expire within 1 minute

userPubkey.description: Order owner public key (deprecated alias; use ownerPubkey)

payerPubkey.description: Fee payer public key (defaults to ownerPubkey when omitted)

positionPubkey.description: On-chain Position PDA address. Null for free parlays.

stakeUsd.description: Decimal USD string. Always "0" for free.

appliedReferralCode.description: Referral code this wallet has already applied, if any

nonce.description: Build nonce used to derive parlayId

legMarketIds.description: Exactly 5 distinct canonical market ids (YES side).

stakeUsd.description: JUPUSD micro-units encoded as the parlay stake escrow amount

payerPubkey.description: Optional fee payer pubkey. When omitted, the configured gasless sponsor may pay; otherwise ownerPubkey pays.

legMarketIds.description: Exactly 5 distinct canonical market ids (YES side).

mint.description: Token mint the user pays with. Must be USDC or JUPUSD. The user always pays exactly 10_000_000 micro-units; USDC is Jupiter-swapped (ExactIn) into JUPUSD before the parlay stake is locked. Pass the JUPUSD mint to skip the swap.

parlays.description: 1..10 parlays to build in one request.

paymentTransaction.description: Base64-encoded unsigned Solana transaction containing a request-binding memo and one SOL transfer per parlay. Sign with the owner wallet and POST to /parlays/free/submit.

legMarketIds.description: Exactly 5 distinct canonical market ids (YES side).

parlays.description: 1..10 free parlays to create in one request.

legMarketIds.description: Exactly 5 distinct canonical market ids (YES side).

txSignature.description: Solana transaction signature for the confirmed entry-fee payment.

parlays.description: 1..10 free parlays to create in one request.

signedTransaction.description: Base64-encoded signed Solana transaction returned by /parlays/free. The transaction memo must match ownerPubkey, parlays, fee recipient, and fee amount.
Fully signed base64-encoded transaction returned by /parlays

legMarketIds.description: Exactly 5 distinct canonical market ids (YES side).

parlays.description: 1..10 parlays to execute in one request.

payer.description: Account that paid ticket account rent

ticketIdHash.description: SHA-256 hash used in the ticket PDA seed

marketId.description: External market or ticket market identifier

venueTicketId.description: Venue ticket identifier after keeper acceptance

maxPayoutUsd.description: Maximum ticket payout in micro USD

operatorNetPnlUsd.description: Settled/refunded/claimed accepted-ticket stake minus latest payout/refund amount, in USD

transaction.description: Base64 encoded transaction. Null for quote-only responses.

ownerPubkey.description: Ticket owner public key. When omitted (e.g. wallet not connected) the endpoint returns a quote-only preview with a null transaction.

payerPubkey.description: Fee payer public key. Defaults to ownerPubkey.

ticketId.description: Optional client ticket id. Generated by the API when omitted.

ticketTitle.description: Optional display title/selection supplied by clients. Ticket state is stored on-chain.

stakeUsd.description: Funding amount in depositMint base units. The on-chain ticket stake is floored to whole-dollar JupUSD.

depositMint.description: Funding mint. Defaults to USDC. Non-JupUSD deposits are swapped to JupUSD.

settlementMint.description: Compatibility field. When provided, must be JupUSD (JuprjznTrTSp2UFa3ZBUFgwdAmtZCq4MQCwysN55USD). Ticket creation always uses JupUSD.

skipSigning.description: When true, returns an unsigned transaction that still requires the API authority signature.

authorityPubkey.description: Owner or keeper authority public key. Defaults to the ticket owner.

payerPubkey.description: Fee payer public key. Defaults to authorityPubkey or ticket owner.

ownerPubkey.description: Position owner public key (alias of owner, prefer ownerPubkey going forward)

market.description: Deterministic market PDA derived from marketId

marketIdHash.description: Hashed market identifier used for on-chain PDAs

isYes.description: True if this is a YES position

outcomeSide.description: Forecast side encoded by the per-side marketId

contracts.description: Legacy whole-contract quantity string, floored for compatibility

contractsMicro.description: Exact contracts held in micro-contract units (u64 as string, 1000000 = 1)

contractsDecimal.description: Exact contracts held as a decimal string

totalCostUsd.description: Total cost basis in micro USD (u128 as string); "0" when basis is unknown (Forecast self-custody ledger doesn't reconcile with the on-chain balance)

sizeUsd.description: Alias of total cost basis in micro USD (u128 as string); "0" when basis unknown

valueUsd.description: Mark-to-market value in micro USD (u128 as string); null once market is closed

avgPriceUsd.description: Average entry price per contract in micro USD (u64 as string); "0" when basis is unknown or ticket is pending

markPriceUsd.description: Current mark price per contract in micro USD (u64 as string); null once market is closed

sellPriceUsd.description: Current best exit price for this side (micro USD string), or null when unavailable

maxSlippageBps.description: Maximum sell slippage in basis points allowed by prediction-market slippage protection before a close/sell order may be rejected. Polymarket positions return the configured event-type threshold; positions without this guard return null.

pnlUsd.description: Unrealized PnL in micro USD (i128 as string); null once market is closed

pnlUsdPercent.description: Unrealized PnL percentage relative to size; null once market is closed

pnlUsdAfterFees.description: Unrealized PnL after fees in micro USD (i128 as string); null once market is closed

pnlUsdAfterFeesPercent.description: Unrealized PnL after fees percentage relative to fee-inclusive size; null once market is closed

feesPaidUsd.description: Total fees paid in micro USD (u64 as string)

integratorFeeUsd.description: Total integrator fees in micro USD (u64 as string)

realizedPnlUsd.description: Realized PnL in micro USD (i64 as number)

claimedUsd.description: Amount claimed in micro USD (u64 as string)

openedAt.description: Unix timestamp when the position was opened

updatedAt.description: Unix timestamp of the last position update

claimableAt.description: Unix timestamp (seconds) when the position becomes claimable; null when unavailable

payoutUsd.description: Expected payout in micro USD based on the current settlement state

settlementDate.description: Unix timestamp (seconds) when the market settles; null when unavailable

claimable.description: True when the position qualifies for payout claim

source.description: Position source key for the backing position model

claimMethod.description: How the position settles: 'automatic' for Forecast auto-settle markets

tradable.description: Whether the position is exit-eligible; BisonFi verifies a live Jupiter route only when prices are included

userPubkey.description: Position owner public key (deprecated alias; use ownerPubkey)

payerPubkey.description: Fee payer public key (defaults to ownerPubkey when omitted)

requiredSigners.description: Public keys that must sign the transaction

contracts.description: Legacy settled whole-contract quantity string, floored for compatibility

contractsMicro.description: Exact settled contract quantity in micro-contract units (u64 as string)

contractsDecimal.description: Exact settled contract quantity as a decimal string

payoutAmountUsd.description: Payout amount in micro USD (u64 as string)

allOf.description: How to submit the returned claim transaction. Echo `context` to POST /execute.

payerPubkey.description: Fee payer public key (defaults to ownerPubkey when omitted)

post.description: Canonical executor endpoint. Cosigns and/or submits a signed transaction returned by transaction-building endpoints (POST /orders, POST /orders/cancel, POST /positions/{positionPubkey}/claim, POST /tickets). When a limit_order_cancel context is supplied, it routes to the cancel flow and returns that flow's native response.

404.description: Side-effect target not found, such as a limit order cancel target
